# CKSyncEngineAccountChangeType.signIn

**Case**

A change indicating a sign-in to an iCloud account.

## Declaration

```swift
case signIn
```

## Account change types

- **CKSyncEngineAccountChangeType.signOut**: A change indicating a sign-out of an iCloud account.
- **CKSyncEngineAccountChangeType.switchAccounts**: A change indicating a switch between two iCloud accounts.
